# GX Solution

Generated by gx wizard.

## GX Outputs

- `dist/gx-solution.solution.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.toolchain-handoff.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.launcher.answers.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.pack.input.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.bundle-plan.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.bundle.answers.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.setup.answers.json`
- `dist/gx-solution.README.generated.md`

## Downstream Toolchain Handoff

- pack compatibility input: `dist/gx-solution.pack.input.json`
- expected downstream bundle output: `dist/dist/gx-solution.gtbundle`
- direct bundle handoff command: `greentic-bundle wizard apply --answers dist/gx-solution.bundle.answers.json`
- launcher compatibility file: `dist/gx-solution.launcher.answers.json`
- launcher target: `greentic-dev.wizard.launcher.main` / `greentic-dev.launcher.main`
